ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride record */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the ride data */,
  "rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides on that date */,
  "twenty_exp_ma" REAL /* 20-day exponential moving average of rides */,
  "poly_average" REAL /* Polynomial average of rides */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the ride started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the ride ended */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the ride in minutes */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the ride */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the ride */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Total fare amount for the ride */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the rider after the ride */,
  "cancellation_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the ride was canceled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical summary */,
  "date_from" TEXT /* Start date for the data range */,
  "date_to" TEXT /* End date for the data range */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total rides during the specified period */,
  "average_rides" REAL /* Average rides per day during the period */,
  "peak_day" INTEGER /* Day with the highest number of rides */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled in rides during the period */,
  "total_fare" REAL /* Total fare amount collected during the period */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance per ride during the period */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare per ride during the period */,
  "total_cancellations" INTEGER /* Total number of canceled rides during the period */,
  "average_cancellation_rate" REAL /* Average cancellation rate during the period */,
  "peak_hour" INTEGER /* Hour with the highest number of rides */,
  "low_hour" INTEGER /* Hour with the lowest number of rides */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, operations manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_for" TEXT /* Department or team for which the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., report, maintenance) */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who sent the notification */,
  "sent_to_department" TEXT /* Department to which the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of the feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the feedback (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
